tests.scenario: Free access to basic mood and feeling tracking features
steps: Launch the MindDoc application
Register for a Mental Health Support User account
Navigate to the mood and feeling tracking features
tests.expected_result: The basic mood and feeling tracking features are accessible without any restrictions or prompts for payment

tests.scenario: List of free or low-cost mental health resources
steps: Log in to the MindDoc application as a Mental Health Support User
Navigate to the resources section
tests.expected_result: A list of free or low-cost mental health resources is displayed

tests.scenario: Track emotions and mental state over time
steps: Log in to the MindDoc application as a user
Navigate to the emotion tracking feature
Record emotions and mental state for a given day
tests.expected_result: The recorded emotions and mental state are stored and can be viewed over time

steps: Log in to the MindDoc application as a user
Navigate to the insights or progress section
tests.expected_result: The system provides insights into the user's weekly progress

steps: Log in to the MindDoc application as a MoodMonitor
Navigate to the mood recording feature
Record mood for a given day
tests.expected_result: The recorded mood is stored and can be viewed later

tests.scenario: View of mood entries over time
steps: Log in to the MindDoc application as a MoodMonitor
Navigate to the mood entries section
tests.expected_result: A view of the mood entries over time is displayed

tests.scenario: Access to emotional support resources library
steps: Log in to the MindDoc application as Emiliana
Navigate to the emotional support resources library
tests.expected_result: The library of emotional support resources is accessible

steps: Log in to the MindDoc application as Emiliana
Navigate to the emotion recording feature
Record emotions and reflect on them
tests.expected_result: The recorded emotions can be reflected on and viewed later

steps: Log in to the MindDoc application as a Mental Health Tracking and Support User
Navigate to the mental health status logging feature
Log mental health status for a given day
tests.expected_result: The logged mental health status is stored and can be viewed later

tests.scenario: List of mental health support resources
steps: Log in to the MindDoc application as a Mental Health Tracking and Support User
Navigate to the resources section
tests.expected_result: A list of resources for mental health support is displayed
